title: Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
description: End-to-end autonomous driving pipeline trained on 8,000+ Cityscapes and CARLA simulation images. Implemented behavioral cloning with CNN-based steering prediction, achieving sub-50ms prediction latency.

title: InstaResume AI
description: Real-time AI-powered resume builder integrated with Google Gemini AI for ATS optimization. Features optimized state synchronization and client-side PDF export workflows.

title: BlogSpace Platform
description: Modular full-stack publishing platform with PostgreSQL relational modeling and JWT-based security. Architected using MVC patterns for scalable routing and middleware orchestration.
